prompt:
A compact two-servo robotic arm segment on a workbench, with a small gripper attached at the end and wiring neatly bundled along the links. The arm is shown in a neutral pose, with a simple test jig nearby (a small cube object to pinch) to communicate that it’s assembled, wired, and ready for motion tuning.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future maker workshop: soft cinematic lighting, realistic fasteners and servo horns, no brand logos, no readable labels, and no text overlays. Keep the arm centered and visually clear as an assembled servo-driven gripper arm.
